infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: OpenFlip needs Bluetooth to communicate with your Flipper Zero device.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: OpenFlip needs Bluetooth to communicate with your Flipper Zero device.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OpenFlip uses the camera to identify hardware devices.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OpenFlip can identify devices from photos in your library.
